items.description: The Mask of the Citipati bore the likeness of the wrathful Tibetan deities. Legend held that wearing the mask would invite their curse, causing unrelenting nightmares and sleep paralysis. The Citipati's wrath left wearers forever haunted by the ghosts of the damned.
